content.en:
Originally, Harmon got all the resources of a secret realm, but unfortunately these resources were basically exhausted by him, otherwise Harmon would not have looked for a second secret realm.

But even so, Harmon left some good stuff behind.

"Three Chaos Spirit Treasures, 30 Pills, 203 Chaos Black Crystals, 24 Charms......"

Together, the miscellaneous things are about worth four or five supreme treasures.

It's a pity that those three Chaos Spirit Treasures were damaged, and when they were fighting with Ye Tian, they were slashed and damaged by Ye Tian's Hunyuan, which made Ye Tian extremely pity.

But if he didn't attack with all his might, he wouldn't be able to kill Harmon.

Among these things, what interested Ye Tian the most were those charms.

Before, Harmon had used charms when he fought him, and these charms were also obtained from the secret realm, but the attack power and speed charms had been used up, and the remaining charms were relatively rare special charms.

There are special spells that cut off the fate of cause and effect, special spells that detect enemies, and special spells that mask breath and strength.

It's just that these charms are not very useful in battle, so Hamon didn't use these charms, and Ye Tian was cheaper.

"Harmon has almost exhausted his resources, many things have been used, and there are so many good things left, if it is a complete secret realm, how many resources and treasures should there be!"

Ye Tian was very excited just by thinking about it a little.

Kunlun Mountains, underground space.

Ye Tian entered here, and then took out a compass, this compass is Hamon's thing, which can sense the existence of the secret realm, but the scope is limited, if the secret realm is too far away, it will not be able to sense it.

At this moment, the compass pointed precisely to the entrance of the secret realm.

Confirming the exact location of the entrance made Ye Tian a lot less troublesome, otherwise he would still need to rely on Hammon's method to confirm the entrance to the secret realm again and again, which would be a waste of a long time.

The entrance to the secret realm is accurately detected, and the next step is to decipher the secret realm formation, and how to decrypt it in Hamon's memory is not the core secret, obviously Harmon did not swear for this, so this part of the memory remained.

Otherwise, Ye Tian could only watch this secret realm, and there was no way to enter it.

Obviously, the Tibetan God Organization did not expect that Hamon would fall early, and even his soul was absorbed by others.

"It takes a little time to decrypt, Hamon was decrypting before but was destroyed by me, at that time I was also curious what he was doing sitting here, it turned out that he was deciphering the secret realm formation. "

Ye Tian was not worried that he would be destroyed, this was the territory of the Terran race, and it was unlikely that anyone would come to trouble him.

As a result, Ye Tian began to use his soul power to cast a strange fluctuation and induce it with the secret realm formation.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful large array appeared in the depths of the void and came into contact with Ye Tian's soul perception.

At this time, Ye Tiancai truly saw the power of the secret realm formation.

"What a mysterious formation, the supremes will never be able to arrange it, and this formation has the effect of shielding the origin of the universe, and the power of the origin of the universe cannot invade it!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

He wasted no time and hurriedly began to decrypt it.

The so-called decryption is to use the soul to launch a set of rule codes, break a gap from this secret realm formation, and form a large array, so that he can enter the secret realm.

This process takes several hours.

In the next few hours, Ye Tian worked very hard to decrypt it, and no one bothered him.

Soon, the decryption was successful.

A spatial gap has appeared!

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over and entered the secret realm through the spatial gap.

Uncharted.

As soon as Ye Tian entered here, he felt the extremely rich chaotic vitality, which was even more refined than the chaotic vitality of the chaotic small world at the beginning.

"If an ordinary god-level cultivator is here, as long as the talent is not bad, he can soon become a galaxy-level or even a galaxy-level!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This secret realm is not big, after all, the purpose of this secret realm is only to store some resources, there is no need to build too big, the bigger the secret realm, the more difficult it is to hide.

At this moment, Ye Tian's divine sense swept away, and he sensed a large hall.

Moreover, the entire secret realm is shrouded in him.

Ye Tian habitually explored this secret realm, and did not find any life, nor did he find any danger.

So, Ye Tian walked towards the main hall.

"From Hamon's memory, the secret realm is not dangerous, but some enchantments are arranged inside the main hall, as long as the corresponding strength can obtain treasures, if the strength is not good, you can't get treasures!"

Ye Tian was very confident in his strength, and the enchantment of the secret realm was not strong.

According to Hamon's memory, in the first secret realm, Hamon broke all the enchantments except for the most core one.

There are many secret rooms in the main hall, and each secret room has an enchantment, and if you break the enchantment, you can obtain the things in the enchantment.

Ye Tian came to the first secret room and broke the barrier of the first secret room very easily.

However, after entering this secret room, Ye Tian was very disappointed, there are a lot of resources here, but most of them are resources that lay the foundation, which have a good effect on below the emperor level or god level, but it is better than nothing for Ye Tian.

The only thing that made Ye Tian a little interested was that there were some secret techniques in it, which could be used for reference, but the value was just like that.

Boom Boom Boom !!

The secret rooms were broken open by Ye Tian and the contents were taken out.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the more core place, where the enchantment required the ultimate combat power to break through.

Some not weak spells, spiritual treasures comparable to supreme treasures, and some precious medicinal materials have begun to appear in the secret room here.

"There are only the last three chambers left!"

Ye Tian stared at the three secret rooms, his expression a little excited.

The enchantment of the most important secret room is very powerful, Hamon can't break it, Ye Tian doesn't know if he can break it, but he can break the two secret rooms next to him.

Chop!

Chop!

Chop!

Ye Tian slashed three times in a row before finally splitting the barrier of the secret room on the left and entering this secret room.

"50 spells, 2 Chaos Spirit Treasures, 150 Chaos Black Crystals, three martial arts, hey, this is ......"

Ye Tian's gaze focused on one of the treasures, a fruit to be exact.

This fruit contained a powerful power, which even made Ye Tian feel a trace of pressure, and close to this fruit, Ye Tian felt that his qi and blood were churning.

"Tianxuan Fruit, that's right, it should be Tianxuan Fruit. When Hamon came to this universe, it was originally difficult to be promoted to a sixth-order life with the resources of this universe, but Hamon could be promoted to a sixth-order life in ten thousand years, unless the practice was inherited, it was to obtain a Heavenly Xuan Fruit. The treasures of every secret realm are not necessarily, I didn't expect that this secret realm also has a Heavenly Mystery Fruit!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

The Heavenly Xuan Fruit could not only allow a cultivator with a low life level to quickly rise to the peak life level of the sixth order, but also had a significant effect on the seventh order life.

For example, Ye Tian, he was now in the middle of the seventh order, and if he cultivated slowly, he didn't know when he would be able to cultivate to the late seventh order life level.

But this Heavenly Xuan Fruit is expected to allow him to break through the bottleneck and reach the late seventh order life level.

Once the life level is increased by a small step, the strength is equivalent to skyrocketing!

The most important thing is that the Tianxuan Fruit can only be taken once in a lifetime, and it is very rare in the chaos, and the Tibetan God Organization has indeed produced a lot of blood this time, and countless resources have been spent for this plan.

"Let's cultivate in this secret room first, anyway, only one person is allowed to enter a secret realm, and I occupy this secret realm, even if other reincarnated people of the Tibetan God Organization come nearby, they will not be able to perceive the secret realm here. "

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, for him, this secret realm is now the safest cultivation place in the universe, and it can even be used as a secret base for him in the future.

Now, he was glad that he had dealt with Harmon before he entered this secret realm, otherwise Harmon would have entered the secret realm, and he would not have been able to deal with him.

It can be said that Hamon's death was too careless on his part, otherwise Ye Tian would not have been able to kill him at all.
